author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
content:
[observation] Adversarial review of TUI (all 5 phases):

CRITICAL (2): C1 — Terminal not restored on error paths (RAII guard needed). C2 — truncate_str panics on multi-byte UTF-8 (byte indexing).

HIGH (4): H1 — Blocking sync.fetch() freezes TUI. H2 — IssuesTab opens DB on every keystroke. H3 — event_scroll u16 truncation >65K. H4 — Panic hook never restored.

MEDIUM (7): M1 — Unbounded scroll past content. M2 — q quits from detail with no confirm. M3 — Clipboard y gives no feedback. M4 — Detail Esc always returns to List not Tree. M5 — Mouse tab click uses byte len. M6 — Flash cleared on any mouse event. M7 — build_tree_recursive no depth limit.

LOW (8): Inconsistent on_enter refresh, r:Refresh hint without global binding, unused content_area, help no scroll, tag filter by index, negative time display, missing y:Copy hints.

Priority fixes: C1, C2, M3.
